prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 19742→20151→21570→21511→23168，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 3426 名；2025 年基准约 23168 名，较 2024 年扩大约 1657 名，后移幅度明显加大；该校在湖北省物理类计划 2021 年 110 人、2022 年 107 人、2023 年 107 人、2024 年 112 人、2025 年 113 人，2026 年计划增至 124 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.7%，招生名额增加在一定程度上缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年约第 80 名，近年排名稳中有升（2021 年第 82 名→2026 年第 80 名），属中上水平理工类院校；2025 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考，对报考心理产生一定抑制；2026 年周期仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件；抖音综合热度排名第 77，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未形成明显报考助推；第五轮学科评估中「管理科学与工程」获评 A，为该校唯一 A 级学科；招生专业中计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等工科专业虽无直接 A 级学科对应，但依托学校整体工科实力，对考生仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，社会热度高；湖北省物理类考生 2021 年 14.7 万→2025 年 25.0 万，持续大幅增长，2026 年全省普通高考总人数 39.37 万，按近年物理类占比约 63% 估算约 24.8 万，竞争基数维持高位，较 2024 年 437 分下降，卷面难度或评分标准有所调整；该校位于安徽省宣城市，非本省高校，在湖北省无本地招生倾斜；跨省报考中地域偏好因素中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年扩招约 9.7%（部分缓解竞争）、湖北省物理类考生规模维持高位、学校声誉偏负面抑制报考热度、热门工科专业社会热度高等多因素，在 2025 年基准 23168 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 24571 名，区间 24071–25071 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程与智能控制
- 智能科学与技术
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械工程
- 新能源材料与器件
- 过程装备与控制工程
- 生物技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 经济学
- 物流管理（数智物流）
- 土木工程
- 环境工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 24071–25071 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 24000 名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程与智能控制、智能科学与技术等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（25000 名左右）应以三档专业保底为主，避免滑档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19742→20151→21570→21511→23168, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3426 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 23168, an increase of about 1657 places compared to 2024, with a significantly larger backward shift; the university's Physics Category plan in Hubei Province was 110 in 2021, 107 in 2022, 107 in 2023, 112 in 2024, and 113 in 2025, and the 2026 plan increases to 124, an expansion of about 9.7% compared to 2025, which to some extent alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it is approximately 80th in 2026, with a stable and slightly rising ranking in recent years (82nd in 2021→80th in 2026), belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions; the reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants, which suppressed application psychology to some extent; the 2026 cycle remains relatively negative, involving academic misconduct incidents; on Douyin, the comprehensive popularity ranking is 77th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, not forming a significant boost to applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 'Management Science and Engineering' was rated A, the only A-level discipline at this university; among the enrollment majors, computer, electronic information, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors, although not directly corresponding to A-level disciplines, still attract candidates due to the university's overall engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province increased from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, showing continuous significant growth; in 2026, the total number of candidates for the provincial college entrance examination is 393,700, and estimated at about 248,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 63%, maintaining a high competition base; compared to 2024, the score of 437 points decreased, indicating adjustments in exam difficulty or scoring standards; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Hubei, with no local admission preference in Hubei Province; the regional preference factor in cross-province applications is neutral to weak.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 expansion of about 9.7% (partially alleviating competition), the high number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, the negative university reputation suppressing application enthusiasm, and the high social popularity of popular engineering majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 23168; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 24571, with a range of 24071–25071.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Engineering
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
- Biotechnology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics
- Logistics Management (Digital Logistics)
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 24071–25071, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 24000), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Intelligent Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 25000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid slipping.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 4525→4564→4609→4923→5213，整体呈缓慢后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 688 名；2025 年基准约 5213 名，较 2024 年扩大约 290 名，后移幅度有所加大；该校在湖北省历史类计划 2021 年 14 人、2022 年 14 人、2023 年 16 人、2024 年 15 人、2025 年 15 人，2026 年计划大幅缩减至 11 人，较 2025 年缩招约 26.7%，招生名额显著减少，竞争明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年约第 80 名，属中上水平理工类院校，对文科考生吸引力相对有限；2025 年高考周期声誉偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），2026 年周期仍偏负面（学术不端事件）；抖音热度排名第 77，评价「一般」，未形成报考助推；第五轮学科评估中「管理科学与工程」A，与历史类招生专业（网络与新媒体、英语）无直接学科映射；文科专业缺乏高 等级学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 网络与新媒体属新闻传播大类，2023–2026 年社会热度「明显劝退」，报考意愿持续走低；英语属外语大类，社会热度「一般观望」；湖北省历史类考生 2021 年 14.9 万→2025 年 14.1 万，总体平稳略降，2026 年全省总考生 39.37 万，按近年历史类占比约 36% 估算约 14.2 万，基本持平，较 2024 年 432 分上升，竞争门槛略有提高；该校位于安徽省宣城市，非本省高校，在湖北省无本地招生倾斜；理工类院校对文科考生吸引力一般。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年 位次缓慢后移趋势、2026 年大幅缩招约 26.7%（显著加剧竞争）、历史类考生规模基本稳定、新闻传播类专业社会热度明显劝退、学校声誉偏负面等多因素，在 2025 年基准 5213 名基础上预计竞争加剧；预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 4409 名，区间 3909–4909 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 网络与新媒体。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 英语（外语语种。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 历史类仅设网络与新媒体和英语两个专业，招生计划大幅缩减至 11 人，竞争加剧；位次在预测区间 3909–4909 名内，建议以网络与新媒体为主力、英语为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（3900 名以内）可重点填报网络与新媒体；位次接近区间上限（4900 名左右）应以英语保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4525→4564→4609→4923→5213, showing a gradual backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 688 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 5213, an increase of about 290 places compared to 2024, indicating a larger backward shift; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 15 in 2025, with a significant reduction to 11 in 2026, a decrease of about 26.7% compared to 2025, significantly reducing enrollment slots and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution with relatively limited appeal to liberal arts candidates; reputation was negative during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors), and remained negative in the 2026 cycle (academic misconduct incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 77th, rated as 'average', not forming a boost for applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 'Management Science and Engineering' received an A grade, but it has no direct disciplinary mapping to the History Category enrollment majors (Network and New Media, English); liberal arts majors lack high-level disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Network and New Media belongs to the Journalism and Communication category, with social popularity 'clearly discouraged' from 2023 to 2026, and application willingness continuing to decline; English belongs to the Foreign Language category, with social popularity 'generally wait-and-see'; the number of History Category candidates in Hubei Province was 149,000 in 2021 and 141,000 in 2025, generally stable with a slight decrease; in 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is 393,700, with an estimated 142,000 based on the recent History Category proportion of about 36%, basically flat, with an increase from the 2024 score of 432, slightly raising the competition threshold; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, not a local university, with no local admission preference in Hubei Province; science and engineering universities generally have limited appeal to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual backward trend of historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction of about 26.7% in 2026 (sharply intensifying competition), the basically stable number of History Category candidates, the clearly discouraged social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors, and the negative university reputation, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 5213; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 4409, with a range of 3909–4909.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Network and New Media.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Foreign Language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only offers two majors: Network and New Media and English, with enrollment significantly reduced to 11, intensifying competition; within the predicted ranking range of 3909–4909, it is recommended to prioritize Network and New Media and use English as a safety; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 3900) can focus on applying for Network and New Media; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (around 4900) should use English as a safety.
